title: bromus hordeaceus subsp. pseudothominei
intro: Bromus hordeaceus subsp. pseudothominei, also known as a subspecies of the cheatgrass plant, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant are said to include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Bromus hordeaceus subsp. pseudothominei are often made into infusions, teas, and poultices, and are used to treat a range of ailments.
